options.name: -cell
options.description: Cell Name for which Leakage Power need to be fetched

options.name: -delay_corner
options.description: Select cell from specified delay corner

options.name: -early
options.description: Select cell from early library of the specified delay corner. If this option is not specified by default late will be used.

options.name: -late
options.description: Select cell from late library of the specified delay corner. If this option is not specified by default late will be used.

options.name: -power_domain
options.description: Select cell from the library of the specified power domain

options.name: -stateleakagegrp
options.description: Print state dependant leakage power information.

options.name: -view
options.description: Select the cell from the specified view.
